channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Iran’s Strait of Hormuz Gambit and the Limits of U.S. Military Power
item.description: A war of endurance, not firepower: Iran leverages the Strait of Hormuz to raise global costs while betting it can outlast U.S. political will.

item.title: Nordic Nukes: Seeking Strategic Agency in Uncertain Times
item.description: The Nordic states anchored their security to NATO’s nuclear umbrella just as U.S. ties grew uncertain. Now, caught between disarmament legacies and a vital deterrence debate, their choices will reshape regional security.
